== Notes for [[Item:Q56591|Q56591]] ==

Gobernador y Capitán General de Honduras y Caballero de Santiago desde 1587

Fuente: Wikipedia

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADB54EFD1EFBBFA9822EF79916C38A9
geni:6000000020921803629

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
